title: P2: Implement IGoalPrecondition on gather/craft/smelt goals
description: IGoalPrecondition and IGoalPostcondition interfaces are defined in PlanningPolicy.cs but no goal class implements them. Implement CanAttempt(ExecutionContext) on GenericGatherGoal, CraftItemGoal, and SmeltGoal to check capability prerequisites (e.g., creative mode → always feasible; survival → require fresh inventory) before plan generation.
